title: [makefile] `ETCDIR` isn't prefixed
body:
/kind bug

**Description**
`87-podman-bridge.conflist` is dangling at the wrong location.

**Describe the results you received:**
See line 42
https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/8d3a82838388d7f3a60dbb713340aed374293a78/Makefile#L38-L42

**Describe the results you expected:**
According to the other parts of the makefile, this is expected:

``` Makefile
ETCDIR ?= ${PREFIX}/etc
```

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**
This is also valid as stated in _Filesystem Hierarchy Standard_ (FHS).

comments.body: Actually, another place might for this file might be`PREFIX/share/doc/podman/examples/`, since it can be also generated from _podman_ itself.
